title: Cannot Create Webhook from API
excerpt:
Hello, 
We cannot create webhook from API; there is no error but webhook id returns null: 
  
All other calls are working for the same API Token. 
What should we do about this? 
Thanks.

posts.author: tgurler (Turan Gurler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We cannot create webhook from API; there is no error but webhook id returns null:

Screen Shot 2021-03-31 at 15.34.011251×310 32.3 KB

All other calls are working for the same API Token.

What should we do about this?

Thanks.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For future readers: this issue has been resolved by the user returning the “challenge” field sent to his webhook URL.

For more information, check out our Webhooks resource here.

Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
